title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: Google Cloud position on building intelligent agents with AI-native databases that support multimodal queries, graph RAG, and natural language interfaces. Emphasizes integration of open standards like Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs for agent deployment.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session explains how AI-native databases give agents access to enterprise data with high-fidelity context through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. It matters because grounding agents in accurate enterprise data shapes the reliability of their outputs. Key takeaways: graph retrieval-augmented generation extends RAG with structured context, and open standards such as Model Context Protocol streamline agentic deployment.
